highlights.title: Daybreak is OpenAI's response to Anthropic's Claude Mythos
highlights.description: OpenAI has launched a cybersecurity initiative called Daybreak, powered by GPT-5.5 and Codex Security.

highlights.title: Anthropic warns against unauthorized stock exposure as token markets imply trillion-dollar valuation
highlights.description: The AI firm says investors should assume indirect access to its private shares is invalid, and transfers of its stock or interests in its stock will not be recognized.

highlights.title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
highlights.description: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth and early-stage startups.

highlights.title: Korea Roils Market by Floating ‘Citizen Dividend’ From AI
highlights.description: A top South Korean policymaker said the nation should pay citizens a “dividend” using taxes on AI profits, underscoring growing pressure to redistribute gains from a boom that’s enriched chipmakers like Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc.

highlights.title: Why AI Matters More Than Iran War in Markets
highlights.description: Global equities have rallied to record levels, fuelled by euphoria over artificial intelligence. Investors' risk appetite has held up despite volatility in energy markets caused by the war in Iran. Bloomberg Markets Live Executive Editor Mark Cudmore and Bloomberg TV Markets Producer Anthony Stephens discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

highlights.title: Australia Watchdog Says Money Launderers Ramping Up AI for Scams
highlights.description: Australia’s financial crimes watchdog warned of a heightened threat of money laundering linked to artificial intelligence that has been used by crooks to scale up activities, automate processes and create fake documents.

highlights.title: Bitcoin miner MARA sold $1.5 billion of bitcoin as it shifts toward AI infrastructure
highlights.description: While the miner said bitcoin remains its operational foundation, first-quarter results point to a company increasingly built around power, data centers and AI demand.
